description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, pre-deploy-hooks, deploy, and post-deploy-hooks. Use the node:8 Docker image for a build job that caches the paths build/ and node_modules/, runs "npm install" then "npm run prepare", and publishes the build/ and node_modules/ directories as artifacts. Add a deploy job that runs in the environment named ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME} using the obezuk/gitlab-ci-cloudflare:latest image, is limited to the staging and production branches, echoes "Deploying to ${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME}", conditionally executes an "eb setenv" command with many secret variables when ${NEEDS_SET_ENV}=true, and finally runs "eb deploy memex-root-service-${CI_ENVIRONMENT_NAME}". Add pre-deploy-hooks and post-deploy-hooks jobs that also run in the same environment, use the sequenceiq/alpine-dev image, are limited to staging and production, and each perform a curl request to the corresponding hook URL with ADMIN_ACCESS_CODE passed as form data and cookie. Set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive.
